chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.032 — Tax Bond Election

Bonds wholly or partly supported by an ad valorem tax may not be issued without an election at which the issuance of the bonds is authorized.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Bonds wholly or partly supported by an ad valorem tax may not be issued without an election at which the issuance of the bonds is authorized.
